expectations.evidence: States 'no data-surface attribute is present in the DOM, so the [data-surface="fg-bold"] CSS blocks never activate'
Shows before/after code: raw <div> replaced with <Surface mode="fg-bold"> from '@oneui/ui/components/Surface'
Explains brand bold inversion: '--Primary-FG-Bold is remapped to a contrasting tinted accent (shifted +8 f-steps on the OkLCH scale)' and shows per-variant behavior table
Includes correct import and usage: import { Surface } from '@oneui/ui/components/Surface'; <Surface mode="fg-bold"><Button variant="ghost">Get Started</Button></Surface>
